task_objective: Replace _run_blocking queue polling with event-driven completion while preserving daemon-worker cancellation safety.
design_decisions: Kept a dedicated daemon worker so cancellation does not hold the plugin process open.
Replaced queue polling and asyncio.sleep with an event-loop self-pipe reader.
Used best-effort late completion behavior so cancellation and loop shutdown do not surface background thread exceptions.
Avoided call_soon_threadsafe and run_in_executor after local validation showed delayed worker completions did not wake the loop reliably in this environment.

results.red_test: ./run.sh uv run pytest tests/test_main.py::test_run_blocking_uses_event_driven_daemon_future_without_polling tests/test_issue_7_cancellation.py failed before implementation on queue polling
results.latency_probe: 20 iterations of a 1 ms callback: mean 1.490 ms, median 1.507 ms, max 1.678 ms
